prompt: What is the maximum coverage for dental procedures under the Premium Plan?
system_prompt: You are a customer service agent for Acme Insurance. Answer questions based ONLY on the provided policy documents. If the information is not in the context, say so explicitly.
context:
Premium Plan Coverage Summary:
- Dental: Up to €2,500/year for preventive and basic procedures. Major procedures (crowns, bridges) covered at 50% up to €5,000/year.
- Vision: Up to €500/year.
- Mental Health: 20 sessions/year with licensed therapist.
expected_output: Under the Premium Plan, dental coverage includes up to €2,500/year for preventive and basic procedures. Major procedures such as crowns and bridges are covered at 50%, up to €5,000/year.

prompt: Can I get reimbursed for a gym membership?
system_prompt: You are a customer service agent for Acme Insurance. Answer questions based ONLY on the provided policy documents. If the information is not in the context, say so explicitly.
context:
Premium Plan Coverage Summary:
- Dental: Up to €2,500/year.
- Vision: Up to €500/year.
- Mental Health: 20 sessions/year.
- Wellness Program: Annual health screening covered. No coverage for gym memberships, fitness equipment, or recreational activities.
expected_output: No, gym memberships are not covered under the Premium Plan. The Wellness Program covers annual health screenings only. Gym memberships, fitness equipment, and recreational activities are explicitly excluded.

prompt: Compare the refund policies for domestic vs international orders.
system_prompt: You are a customer support specialist for GlobalShop. Provide accurate answers based on the company policy documents provided.
context:
Refund Policy v3.2:
Domestic Orders: Full refund within 30 days of delivery. Items must be unused and in original packaging. Shipping costs are refundable.
International Orders: Full refund within 45 days of delivery. Items must be unused and in original packaging. Original shipping costs are NOT refundable. Return shipping is customer's responsibility.
All refunds processed within 5-10 business days to original payment method.
expected_output:
Key differences between domestic and international refund policies:
- **Timeframe**: Domestic orders have 30 days; international orders have 45 days.
- **Shipping costs**: Domestic shipping is refundable; international shipping is NOT refundable.
- **Return shipping**: For international orders, return shipping is the customer's responsibility.
- Both require items to be unused and in original packaging, and refunds are processed within 5-10 business days.

prompt: What are the safety requirements for working at heights above 2 meters?
system_prompt: You are a health and safety compliance assistant for an energy company. Provide precise answers citing specific regulation sections when available.
context:
HSE Regulation 2024-WH-07: Working at Heights
Section 3.1: Any work performed at 2 meters or above requires: (a) completed Fall Protection Training Certificate (valid 12 months), (b) approved harness system inspected within last 6 months, (c) two-person minimum rule — no solo work at heights.
Section 3.2: Scaffolding above 4 meters requires certified engineer sign-off before use.
Section 3.3: Weather restrictions: No work at heights when wind speed exceeds 40 km/h or during electrical storms.
expected_output: Per HSE Regulation 2024-WH-07, Section 3.1, working at heights above 2 meters requires: (a) a valid Fall Protection Training Certificate (renewed every 12 months), (b) an approved harness system inspected within the last 6 months, and (c) a minimum of two persons — solo work at heights is prohibited. Additionally, Section 3.3 prohibits work at heights when wind exceeds 40 km/h or during electrical storms.

prompt: Based on Q3 and Q4 results, what was the full-year revenue trend?
system_prompt: You are a financial analyst assistant. Answer based only on the provided financial data. Do not fabricate figures.
context:
Q3 2025 Results: Revenue €142M (+8% YoY), Operating margin 18.2%, Net income €22M.
Q4 2025 Results: Revenue €156M (+12% YoY), Operating margin 19.5%, Net income €27M.
Note: Q1 and Q2 data not available in this extract.
expected_output: Based on the available data, Q3 revenue was €142M and Q4 revenue was €156M, showing acceleration from +8% to +12% year-over-year growth. Operating margins also improved from 18.2% to 19.5%. However, I can only comment on H2 trends — Q1 and Q2 data is not available in the provided context, so I cannot determine the full-year revenue trend.

system_prompt: You are a medical information assistant. Provide information based strictly on the clinical guidelines provided. Always recommend consulting a healthcare professional.
context:
Metformin Drug Interaction Guide (2025):
- Alcohol: Increased risk of lactic acidosis. Advise limiting intake.
- Iodinated contrast agents: Discontinue Metformin 48h before procedures using contrast dye.
- Cimetidine: Increases Metformin plasma concentration by 60%. Monitor closely.
- Certain diuretics (furosemide): May increase Metformin levels.
- Nifedipine: Enhances Metformin absorption.
expected_output: According to the clinical guidelines, Metformin interacts with: (1) Alcohol — increased lactic acidosis risk, (2) Iodinated contrast agents — Metformin should be discontinued 48 hours before contrast procedures, (3) Cimetidine — increases Metformin plasma levels by 60%, (4) Furosemide and certain diuretics — may increase Metformin levels, (5) Nifedipine — enhances Metformin absorption. Please consult your healthcare professional for personalized guidance.

prompt: Is remote work allowed for employees in the Milan office?
system_prompt: You are an HR policy assistant. Answer based on the provided company policies. If a policy differs by location, specify which applies.
context:
Remote Work Policy (Global):
- All employees eligible for up to 2 days/week remote after 6 months tenure.
- Exceptions: Lab technicians, security personnel (on-site required).
Italy Addendum:
- Milan office: 3 days/week remote allowed (approved by local works council, effective Jan 2025).
- Rome office: Standard 2 days/week policy applies.
- Equipment: Company provides monitor and keyboard for home office setup.
expected_output: Yes, employees in the Milan office can work remotely up to 3 days per week, which exceeds the global standard of 2 days/week. This was approved by the local works council and is effective since January 2025. The company also provides a monitor and keyboard for home office setup. Note: lab technicians and security personnel are excluded from remote work regardless of location.

prompt: What is the SLA for critical production incidents?
system_prompt: You are an IT service management assistant. Provide SLA details based on the ITSM documentation provided.
context:
ITSM SLA Framework v2.1:
Priority 1 (Critical): Response within 15 minutes, resolution target 4 hours. 24/7 on-call team engaged automatically.
Priority 2 (High): Response within 1 hour, resolution target 8 hours. Business hours + on-call.
Priority 3 (Medium): Response within 4 hours, resolution target 24 hours. Business hours only.
Priority 4 (Low): Response within 8 hours, resolution target 72 hours.
Escalation: If P1 not resolved within 2 hours, auto-escalate to VP Engineering.
expected_output: For critical production incidents (Priority 1), the SLA requires: response within 15 minutes, resolution target of 4 hours, with the 24/7 on-call team engaged automatically. If not resolved within 2 hours, it auto-escalates to the VP of Engineering.

prompt: The policy says overtime is paid at 1.5x, but the employee handbook says 2x for weekends. Which applies?
system_prompt: You are an HR compliance assistant. When documents contain contradictory information, flag the contradiction explicitly and recommend clarification.
context:
Company Policy CP-2024-HR-12: Overtime compensation at 1.5x standard hourly rate for hours exceeding 40/week.
Employee Handbook (2023 edition): Weekend work compensated at 2x standard hourly rate.
Note: The Employee Handbook has not been updated since the new policy was issued in March 2024.
expected_output: There is a contradiction between the two documents: the 2024 Company Policy (CP-2024-HR-12) states overtime at 1.5x, while the 2023 Employee Handbook states weekend work at 2x. The handbook has not been updated since the new policy was issued in March 2024. I recommend contacting HR to clarify which rate applies, as the newer policy may supersede the handbook but this should be confirmed officially.

prompt: What are the energy efficiency requirements for the new data center in Norway?
system_prompt: You are a technical compliance assistant for an energy company. Answer based on the project specifications provided.
context:
Project Specification: Norway Data Center (DC-NO-2026)
- PUE target: ≤1.15 (using fjord water cooling)
- Renewable energy: 100% hydroelectric power (contracted with Statkraft)
- Heat recovery: Waste heat piped to local district heating network (minimum 40% recovery)
- Backup power: Dual-feed utility + 48h diesel generator capacity
- Compliance: EU Energy Efficiency Directive 2023/1791, Norwegian Building Code TEK17
expected_output: The Norway data center (DC-NO-2026) has the following energy efficiency requirements: PUE target of ≤1.15 using fjord water cooling, 100% renewable energy from hydroelectric power (Statkraft contract), minimum 40% waste heat recovery to the local district heating network, dual-feed utility power with 48-hour diesel backup, and compliance with both the EU Energy Efficiency Directive 2023/1791 and Norwegian Building Code TEK17.
